goals: Explore the project structure to understand the codebase organization
Find files related to cinema, projection, or film handling
Search for specific functionality related to projector control or scheduling

user_agent_config.personality: Enthusiastic about vintage cinema technology but curious about modern digital systems. Asks practical questions about how things work.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows film projectors and cinema operations well, but has limited programming knowledge. Doesn't know tool names or APIs.

end_condition: The user has explored the codebase structure and found relevant files related to cinema/projection functionality.
